title: Remove unsupported T-Beam Supreme commands
description: Until a canonical T-Beam Supreme Zephyr board is added, remove active west build commands and documentation that present tbeam_supreme as a valid target. This does not decide whether future support will be added.
acceptance_criteria: No active command presents tbeam_supreme as a valid west board; references clearly state unsupported/pending status; adding future support remains tracked by parent w8rd.
